## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click on ...
3. Scroll to ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or unexpected output.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Device:** (e.g. iPhone 15, Pixel 8, MacBook Pro)
- **OS:** (e.g. iOS 18, Android 15, macOS 15)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Safari 18, Chrome 130)
- **App mode:** PWA (installed) / Browser tab
- **App version:** (visible in profile screen)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. does it happen consistently, only on certain networks, only with specific medications).
